title: Use of Funds in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger use of funds in practice judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Use of Funds in Practice is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Use of Funds in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good use of funds in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Use of Funds in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
